allow: Bash(node -e "try { require\('./server.js'\); } catch\(e\) { if \(e.code === 'MODULE_NOT_FOUND'\) console.log\('Missing dep:', e.message\); else if \(e.message.includes\('EADDRINUSE'\)\) console.log\('Syntax OK \(port in use\)'\); else console.log\('Error:', e.message\); }")

PowerShell(Get-WinEvent -LogName System -MaxEvents 50 | Where-Object { $_.TimeCreated -gt \(Get-Date\).AddDays\(-2\) -and $_.LevelDisplayName -match 'Error|Warning' } | Select-Object TimeCreated, LevelDisplayName, Message -First 10 | Format-List)

PowerShell(Get-WinEvent -LogName Application -MaxEvents 100 | Where-Object { $_.TimeCreated -gt \(Get-Date\).AddDays\(-1\) -and \($_.Message -match 'wscript|vbs|node|dental' -or $_.ProviderName -match 'wscript'\) } | Select-Object TimeCreated, LevelDisplayName, ProviderName, Message -First 10 | Format-List)
PowerShell(Get-WinEvent -LogName System -MaxEvents 20 | Where-Object { $_.Id -eq 12 -or $_.Id -eq 6005 -or $_.Id -eq 6006 } | Select-Object TimeCreated, Id, Message | Format-List)

PowerShell(Get-WinEvent -LogName Application | Where-Object { $_.Id -eq 1000 -and $_.Message -match 'node' -and $_.TimeCreated -gt \(Get-Date\).AddDays\(-5\) } | Select-Object TimeCreated, Message -First 5 | Format-List)
